_comment: Single source of truth for the SIM2FIELD KaTeX pre-render pipeline. Each key is a TeX-delimited source in this build/ dir; each value is the generated, pre-rendered HTML that ships at the repo root. verify-build.js re-renders every source through prerender.js and byte-compares against the committed output, so a hand-edited output cannot drift from its source. Add a line here when a new asset is migrated.
